feedbackus-desc: Extension allows user give a feedback.
feedbackus-specialpage-text:
This page shows list of articles with feedback from visitors.
Notice: MAGIC are comments from {{#feedme:width|height}} box inserted to a page.
feedbackus-title: See the review and put your feeback here.
feedbackus-specialpage-otrsinfo: Comments with email address for answer are sent to OTRS.
articlescores-sp-info: First #ITEMS articles that meet the selected filtr are displayed.
articlescores-one-per-day: Your review hasn't been inserted (one review per article per day allowed)!
feedbackus-00-startitle: This article hasn't been rated yet
feedbackus-0-startitle: What's your review of this article?
